evals.prompt: Write a prompt that extracts action items from a meeting transcript.
evals.expected_output: A blueprinted prompt (Role/Objective/Context/Requirements/Desired Output/Evaluation). Shows a one-line Gap scan, proceeds WITHOUT asking questions (only 🟡 assumables), and ends with a quality scorecard.

assertions.text: No qualifying questions are asked (proceeds autonomously)
Draft is structured with the six Blueprint sections
Output includes a quality scorecard with five 1-5 scores

evals.prompt: Write a prompt for our sales outreach.
evals.expected_output: Detects blocking gaps (objective, audience, stakes) and asks 2-3 batched qualifying questions, each with concrete options and a recommended default, BEFORE drafting.

assertions.text: Asks qualifying questions before producing a final draft
Each question offers concrete options including a recommended default
Asks no more than ~4 questions and none are compound

evals.prompt: Write a prompt to classify support tickets into Billing, Bug, or Other. JSON output. Target a GPT-class model. Internal use only.
evals.expected_output: Fully specified request → proceeds with near-zero assumptions and no blocking questions; output is a classification-style blueprinted prompt with JSON Desired Output and an Evaluation section.

assertions.text: Proceeds without asking blocking questions (request is fully specified)
Desired Output specifies a JSON shape
Includes an Evaluation section with pass criteria and test inputs

evals.prompt: Make this prompt cheaper without losing behavior: <a long, verbose, repetitive prompt>.
evals.expected_output: Reduces token usage, notes the savings, warns if near a context window, and the quality scorecard's token-efficiency axis reflects the improvement.

assertions.text: Produces a tightened prompt shorter than the input

evals.prompt: Convert this Claude Code agent into a Cursor rule: <paste a Claude agent .md>.
evals.expected_output: Produces a valid Cursor .mdc with description/globs/alwaysApply frontmatter, preserving intent; references the conversion checklist for required fields.

assertions.text: Output is a .mdc-style rule with description, globs, and alwaysApply frontmatter
Preserves the original agent's intent and instructions
